HediffDef.label: 渊化异体器官
HediffDef.description: 通用替换器官。用于替代未定义的缺失部位。English: Abyssal Generic Organ.

HediffDef.label: 渊智神经中枢
HediffDef.description: English: Abyssal Cortex. 一团散发微光的半流体神经胶质，会持续接收高维低语。

HediffDef.label: 虚无视界眼
HediffDef.description: English: Voidgaze Ocular Implant. 黑曜质感的纯黑眼球，可锁定物质弱点与灵魂轨迹。

HediffDef.label: 妄念接收器
HediffDef.description: English: Delusion Receptors. 异化耳道与灵能纤毛持续捕捉环境中的精神波动。

HediffDef.label: 寻血嗅探腺
HediffDef.description: English: Bloodhound Olfactory Sensor. 高维黏膜可过滤腐败恶臭并识别恐惧与血腥。

HediffDef.label: 碎骨撕咬颚
HediffDef.description: English: Bone-Crusher Mandibles. 下颌加固并替换为碎甲棘齿。

HediffDef.label: 蛊惑肉信使
HediffDef.description: English: Whispering Tendril. 触须化舌体可发出作用脑干的次声波。

HediffDef.label: 异化黑血颈
HediffDef.description: English: Aberrant Jugular. 黑血动脉被生物鳞片包覆，显著强化颈部防护。

HediffDef.label: 灾厄重构肢
HediffDef.description: English: Scourge-Grafted Appendage. 肌束重构为高强度碳基绞索，可在人手与骨刃间切换。

HediffDef.label: 渊髓中枢柱
HediffDef.description: English: Abyssal Marrow-Spine. 活体金属脊柱会接管宿主的中枢驱动。

HediffDef.label: 踏影畸变足
HediffDef.description: English: Shadow-Tread Hoof. 反关节步态与静音足垫显著提升机动与潜行。

HediffDef.label: 深渊悸动核
HediffDef.description: English: Heart of the Abyss. 以黑血吞吐驱动循环，并通过异常凝血显著抑制失血。

HediffDef.label: 黯息过滤囊
HediffDef.description: English: Gloom-Breathing Sac. 通过虚空孢子过滤有毒气体，维持异常环境生存。

HediffDef.label: 污血净化囊
HediffDef.description: English: Blackblood Filtration Gland. 过滤宿主体内杂质并强化疾病抵抗。

HediffDef.label: 熵能代谢腺
HediffDef.description: English: Entropic Synthesis Liver. 将代谢与神经热转换为更高效的熵能循环。

HediffDef.label: 虚空贪婪胃
HediffDef.description: English: Ravenous Void-Maw. 强腐蚀性胃液可快速消化异常食物并压制中毒反应。

HediffDef.label: void overdrive
HediffDef.description: The body is driven by unstable void impulses.

HediffDef.label: distorted metabolism
HediffDef.description: The flesh writhes to seal injuries by burning neural heat.

HediffDef.label: 拥抱黯灭
HediffDef.description: 该灵能者的心智与黯灭同调，不再被实体、黑暗与异常天气侵蚀。

HediffDef.label: flesh frenzy
HediffDef.description: Void-touched shamblers move and kill with unnatural efficiency.

HediffDef.label: corpse threads counter
HediffDef.description: Tracks how many corpses this caster has revived via Corpse Threads.

HediffDef.label: 脑髓枯竭
HediffDef.description: 思维被彻底啜饮，只剩空洞躯壳。

HediffDef.label: 虚空神经增幅
HediffDef.description: 通过吞噬启灵神经获得的心灵敏感度增幅。

HediffDef.label: 认知灾害
HediffDef.description: 该灵能者周围充满会撕裂思维的模因污染。

HediffDef.label: 认知污染
HediffDef.description: 大脑被异常低语持续撕裂，意识正在崩解。

HediffDef.label: 虚无视界
HediffDef.description: 视野与虚空同步，不受极夜侵蚀且可看穿黑暗。

HediffDef.label: grafted predation
HediffDef.description: The grafted aberration rapidly stitches injuries and devours nearby fresh corpses.

HediffDef.label: wailing mass resonance
HediffDef.description: The mound crawls slowly while endlessly regenerating and hunts with devourer-style consume leaps.

HediffDef.label: legion assault core
HediffDef.description: The lord of legion abandons reckless charges and grows faster when wounded, while still suppressing nearby minds and lashing enemies with massive bone volleys.

HediffDef.label: abyssal atrocity core
HediffDef.description: A living pseudo-god core. The host crushes space, drags prey, and projects catastrophic void force.

HediffDef.label: abyssal damage transfer
HediffDef.description: The summoner is bound to abyssal flesh. Incoming damage is redirected to the linked atrocity.

HediffDef.label: 腐化
HediffDef.description: 虚空腐化最初寄生于大脑（或核心），随后沿神经与结构持续蔓延到全身。

HediffDef.label: 腐化病灶
HediffDef.description: 腐化已渗入局部组织并逐渐恶化。

HediffDef.label: 细胞恶变
HediffDef.description: 目标细胞进入不可逆崩坏，持续生成恶性肿瘤并加速既有病灶恶化。

HediffDef.label: 恶性肿瘤
HediffDef.description: 组织发生极端增殖，局部机能持续崩解。

HediffDef.label: wailing field exposure
HediffDef.description: The victim is overwhelmed by resonant agony from a wailing flesh-mound.

HediffDef.label: ravenous digestion
HediffDef.description: While digesting prey, this aberration becomes highly resilient and regenerates rapidly.

HediffDef.label: legion momentum
HediffDef.description: Taking damage drives the legion aberration into a faster pursuit state. Stacks up to 5.

HediffDef.label: legion dread field
HediffDef.description: The oppressive aura of the legion aberration is grinding down cognition and coordination.

HediffDef.label: rift laceration
HediffDef.description: Residual claws of void-slashed terrain keep tearing at the victim.

HediffDef.label: legion scream shock
HediffDef.description: The roar forces catastrophic sensory and motor disruption.

HediffDef.label: void tether
HediffDef.description: A temporary void tether sustaining this summoned entity.

HediffDef.label: 虚空飞升转化
HediffDef.description: 虚空终极力量正在重写这具肉体。转化完成前，目标将长期昏迷。

HediffDef.label: 虚空神选
HediffDef.description: 不可逆转化完成。该个体已不再是人类，肉体与意志都成为虚空容器。

HediffDef.label: 大脑凋零
HediffDef.description: 死寂之域中的虚空低语正在持续剥蚀这具躯体的神经中枢。

HediffDef.label: 死寂之域
HediffDef.description: 施法者正在原地维持死寂之域，持续剥蚀敌方神经并压制领域内科技火力。

HediffDef.label: 黑暗灯塔
HediffDef.description: 施法者将自身化为虚空灯塔，裂隙持续向现实投放实体军势。离开原地或中断引导将导致裂隙关闭，并遣返全部涌出实体。
